strengths: Completed all transfers without drops or board assistance
Maintained smooth bilateral coordination throughout the task
Achieved solid time performance at 42 seconds
weaknesses: Excessive regrasping and repositioning during transfers
Inconsistent pickup angles leading to unstable object control
Inefficient hand positioning causing unnecessary instrument adjustments

drills.name: Mid-air transfer ladder
drills.description: Practice 12 full transfers without touching the pegboard for support, focusing on stable release and regrasp angles
drills.targets_weakness: Excessive regrasping and repositioning during transfers

drills.name: Nondominant pickup rehearsal
drills.description: Spend 5 minutes practicing first-hand pickups using only the nondominant hand to improve pickup consistency
drills.targets_weakness: Inconsistent pickup angles leading to unstable object control

drills.name: Economy-of-motion ladder
drills.description: Perform the task slowly with minimal wasted regrasping, focusing on optimal hand positioning from the start
drills.targets_weakness: Inefficient hand positioning causing unnecessary instrument adjustments

progression_note: At the intermediate level, focus on converting your consistent completion into faster, cleaner repetitions by eliminating unnecessary movements and improving initial object control.
